# GitPersona ⚡
### Your GitHub profile. Your vibe. Generated by AI.

![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue?style=flat-square)
![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/status-v1.0%20live-brightgreen?style=flat-square)
![Built with](https://img.shields.io/badge/built%20with-vibes-ff69b4?style=flat-square)

---

## What is GitPersona?

GitPersona is a free, browser-based AI tool that generates a personalised GitHub profile README based on your personality, vibe, and colour preferences.

No login. No install. No coding required. Just fill in your info, pick your vibe, pick your palette — and AI writes your README in seconds.

🌐 **Live at:** `https://ebukaX.github.io/gitpersona`

---

## ✨ Features

- 📝 **Simple info form** — name, role, skills, what you're building
- 🎭 **5 vibe options** — Minimalist, Internship Mode, CMD/Terminal, Creative Chaos, Mysterious Dev
- 🎨 **6 colour palettes** — Midnight, Ocean, Sakura, Ember, Matrix, Ghost
- 🤖 **AI-powered generation** — your README is written to match your vibe and palette
- 👁️ **Live preview** — see your README before you use it
- 📋 **Copy to clipboard** — one click
- ⬇️ **Download as .md** — ready to paste into GitHub

---

## 🎭 The Vibes

| Vibe | Personality | Best For |
|---|---|---|
| 🖤 Minimalist | Clean, no fluff | Everyone who values simplicity |
| 💼 Internship Mode | Polished, hire-me energy | Students & job seekers |
| 💻 CMD / Terminal | Hacker aesthetic | CS & security folks |
| 🎨 Creative Chaos | Bold, fun, expressive | Designers & creative devs |
| 🌙 Mysterious Dev | Cryptic and cool | Those who say little but hit hard |

---

## 🎨 The Palettes

| Palette | Colours | Mood |
|---|---|---|
| 🖤 Midnight | Deep blacks & dark grays | Serious, focused |
| 🔵 Ocean | Blues & teals | Calm, trustworthy |
| 🌸 Sakura | Pinks & purples | Warm, creative |
| 🟠 Ember | Oranges & reds | Bold, energetic |
| 🟢 Matrix | Greens on black | Full hacker mode |
| 🤍 Ghost | Whites & light grays | Minimal, airy |

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript (single file — no frameworks)
- **AI:** Claude API (Anthropic)
- **Hosting:** GitHub Pages (free)
- **No backend** — everything runs in the browser

---

## 🤝 Contributing

GitPersona is open source and contributions are very welcome!

The easiest ways to contribute:
- 🎭 Add a new vibe
- 🎨 Add a new colour palette
- 🐛 Fix a bug
- 🎨 Improve the UI

Check out [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for step-by-step instructions. Issues tagged `good first issue` are perfect for first-time contributors.

---

## 🚀 Running Locally

No install needed. Just:

1. Clone or download the repo
2. Open `index.html` in your browser
3. That's it

```bash
git clone https://github.com/ebukaX/gitpersona.git
cd gitpersona
open index.html
```
